name: Alberta Innovates HYRS — University of Alberta
eligibility: Grade 11, north of Red Deer, 85%+ in Math 20, Bio 20, and one other science
description: Paid 6-week summer research placement in health sciences. Work alongside UofA researchers. ~20 spots from ~175 applicants.

name: Alberta Innovates HYRS — University of Calgary
eligibility: Grade 11, south of Red Deer to north of Claresholm, 85%+ in Math 20, Bio 20, and one other science
description: Paid summer research in biomedical and health sciences at UCalgary. Cohort programming, guest lectures, poster symposium.

name: Alberta Innovates HYRS — University of Lethbridge
eligibility: Grade 11, in or south of Claresholm, 85%+ in Math 20, Bio 20, and one other science
description: Paid summer health research at ULethbridge. Guest lectures, panel discussions, poster showcase on Aug 13.

name: WISEST Summer Research Program
eligibility: Grade 11 students; focus on underrepresented groups in STEM, open to all genders
description: 6-week paid STEM research internship. ~40 spots. Lab or field work with UofA researchers. Running since 1984.

name: FEM+ Engineering Mentorship Program
provider: Faculty of Engineering, University of Alberta
eligibility: Women and non-binary high school students interested in engineering
description: 7-month mentorship pairing high school students with UofA engineering students. Info sessions and social events included.

name: ELITE Program for Black Youth
eligibility: Black youth aged 15–22 interested in STEM
description: Paid STEM research internship creating experiential learning opportunities for Black youth in science and innovation.

name: TeamUP Science
description: Alberta-based mentorship and experiential learning for students underrepresented in STEM.

name: SHAD Canada
description: Month-long STEAM program on a Canadian university campus. Solve real-world problems in teams. Network with like-minded peers.
